# Attorney Q&A / RFE Log

> **Purpose:** one running record of everything your attorney (or USCIS, via an RFE) has
> asked, your answer, and where the supporting document now lives. This is how you stop the
> same question being asked twice and prove items were addressed. Keep entries about
> **status and location** — don't paste sensitive figures or PII here.
